pwa.updateBody: A new version is ready. Reload now to update.

header.title: Catering Portal
header.subtitle: Order meals for the next week

menuAlert.title: Menu Alert
menuAlert.description: Send email to all users about the new weekly menu

reminder.title: Order Reminder
reminder.description: Send reminder to employees who haven't ordered for next week

auth.emailOrIdPlaceholder: Enter email address or ID number
auth.enterNewPasswordDesc: Enter a new password for your account
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link
auth.profileNotCreatedDesc: Your profile has not been created yet. Please contact administrator or sign out and register again.
auth.magicLinkDesc: Enter your email and you'll receive a link to sign in without a password.
auth.chooseAccess: Choose how you want to access

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

errors.userExists: A user with this email address already exists.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid login credentials. If you don't have an account, please contact administrator for registration.
errors.confirmEmail: Please check your email and confirm your account.
errors.userNotFoundById: User with this ID not found
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many login attempts. Please try again in {{seconds}} seconds.

success.checkEmailConfirm: Check your email to confirm your account.
success.magicLinkDesc: Check your email for the login link. The link expires in 60 minutes.
success.checkEmailReset: Check your email for the password reset link.
success.canLoginNow: You can now log in with your new password.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.cardIdHelp: Your identification number. Contact administrator for changes.
profile.idReadOnlyHelp: ID is permanently assigned. Contact administrator for changes.
profile.idSetupRequired: You must enter your employee ID to continue using the application
profile.setupIdDescription: Enter your unique identification number provided by the administrator
profile.idAlreadyExists: ID {{id}} is already assigned to another user
profile.idMustBeNumeric: ID must be a numeric value
profile.idSetSuccess: ID set successfully! You can now use all app features.
profile.changePasswordDescription: Update your password for app access
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
profile.organizationRequired: You must select an organizational unit

settings.tagSelectionVisibleDesc: Show organizational unit selection option to employees during registration

orders.title: Orders
orders.reviewCurrentWeek: Review meals for current week (read only)
orders.canEditUntil: You can add and modify orders until Friday at 5 PM
orders.orderDeadlinePassed: Ordering deadline for next week has passed (Friday 5:00 PM)
orders.allOrdered: You have ordered meals for all available days ({{ordered}}/{{total}})
orders.noMealsForDay: No meals available for selected day
orders.orderedAllDays: You ordered meals for all available days
orders.movingToNextDay: Moving to next day... ({{count}} day remaining)
orders.movingToNextDays: Moving to next day... ({{count}} days remaining)
orders.profileIncomplete: You must set your ID and organization in your profile before ordering meals
orders.noMenusForNextWeek: No menus defined for next week

feedback.title: Feedback & Suggestions
feedback.subtitle: Share your opinion and suggestions for improving catering service
feedback.feedbackDescription: Share your experience with catering service, food quality, service speed, staff and everything else
feedback.feedbackPlaceholder: Describe your experience with catering service, food quality, service speed, staff...
feedback.suggestionDescription: Suggest a new meal you would like to see on the menu
feedback.mealDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Juicy chicken fillet with fresh vegetables
feedback.additionalNotesPlaceholder: Additional information about your suggestion, why you think this meal would be a good choice...

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how you want to receive meal ordering reminders
notifications.emailDescription: Receive meal ordering reminders via email
notifications.pushDescription: Receive reminders directly on your device
notifications.pushNotSupported: Your browser does not support push notifications
notifications.pushBlocked: Push notifications are blocked. Enable them in browser settings.
notifications.scheduleInfo: Reminders are sent on Wednesdays and Fridays at 12:00 PM
